properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are gathered here as a family Sharing love, sharing peace and pardon But outside this holy place Are so many lost in sin If we keep our love inside these walls How will they ever know That the words we say are true That the God we serve is real

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Share your faith, share the peace and joy you know Share the light in a world of darkness Share the truth that can set of all people free Be the love of Christ, let Him live in you and me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As the ones who’ve gone before us Walked in faith, may we boldly follow Trusting in our eternal God Who is with us still today Joining hands and hearts and lives as one To make the message known That the words we say are true That the God we serve is real

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Be the love of Christ Let Him live in you and me
